response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched video, identified 4 distinct songs based on visual cues (text in top-left).
2. Song 1: "SHINKIRO" (Houshou Marine & Gawr Gura). Performed by Gura. Japanese/English.
3. Song 2: "Myth or Treat" (Hololive English -Myth-). Performed by Gura. English.
4. Song 3: "Our Bright Parade" (Hololive English -Advent-). Performed by Gura. Japanese/English.
5. Song 4: "Ash Again" (Gawr Gura). Performed by Gura. English.
6. Performed web searches for lyrics for all songs.
7. Mapped scenes to timestamps and populated JSON.
response.global_summary: A 4-song medley performed by Gawr Gura, featuring different vocal tracks with text-based intros.

scenes.description: Song "SHINKIRO" begins, performed by Gawr Gura. Text [SHINKIRO] appears in top-left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
似た人みたい (Hmm, so look alike)
解けかけた魔法ね (Hmm, fade-in, fade-out)
遠い夏の あの眩暈に (Ah)
戻りたいの (Ah, be with you)
No more.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hmm, so look alike
Hmm, fade-in, fade-out
Ah, return to that distant summer's dizziness
Ah, be with you
No more.

scenes.description: Song "Myth or Treat" begins, performed by Gawr Gura. Text [Myth or Treat] appears in top-left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Your oshi's waiting in the closet tonight
No way to stop, she's dead set on giving you a fright
Trick or treat but now we're all outta candy
Feelin' just a little sick?

scenes.description: Song "Our Bright Parade" begins, performed by Gawr Gura. Text [Our Bright Parade] appears in top-left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Parade, Parade, Parade! It's all so beautiful
The moments of forgiveness shining
Lighting up the darkest night
Rain or shine, I'll treasure our kaleidoscope sky
A journey that is made just for us
And here I am, right by your side
Cause there you are, standing by my side.

scenes.description: Song "Ash Again" begins, performed by Gawr Gura. Text [Ash Again] appears in top-left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Face to face with time again
We walk once more to the end
Burn it down, burn it down
Waves can't put out my flame
Death will never write my name
